_comment: CROSS-REPO PARITY GOLDEN for the plan_graph engine (A2.1 Piece 0a). The gtd plugin's scripts/plan_graph.py and the rtm-mcp server's src/rtm_mcp/plan_graph.py are byte-compatible-by-hand ports of one algorithm; this golden is the automated guard. BOTH repos carry an identical copy of this file and a test (gtd: test_plan_graph_parity.py; rtm-mcp: tests/test_plan_graph_parity.py) asserting build_graph(input.header, input.rows)'s thin surface (edges / judgement / order / cycles / fingerprint) == expected. If either engine drifts, its test fails. Regenerate ONLY when BOTH engines are changed in lockstep, and update BOTH copies. Generated 2026-06-27; verified identical across gtd (sandbox py3.12) and rtm-mcp (host py3.12), fingerprint 942eed2665959aa9.
